ops.title: SerpApi added as fallback flight search backend
ops.body: bridge.py's default search callable is now _search_with_fallback: fli (Google Flights) stays primary; on fli exception or zero priced results, and only when SERPAPI_API_KEY or prefs serpapi_op_ref resolves, the pair re-prices via serp.search (SerpApi google_flights engine, free tier 250 searches/mo). Quotes carry source: fli|serpapi; keyless fallback is a modeled failure detail ('fallback: no serpapi key'), never an exception. serp.py strips query strings from every error path because the api_key rides a query param — leak-pinned by tests in test_serp.py.
